name: Sugar Smash
description: Sugar Smash is a colorful and addictive match-3 puzzle game where you match cakes, candies, and lollipops to clear levels and score big! Enjoy vibrant graphics, smooth animations, and satisfying combos as you progress through exciting challenges. Swap and match sweet treats to create powerful boosters and complete objectives. With easy controls and fun gameplay, Sugar Smash is perfect for players of all ages. Play now and dive into a world full of sugary fun!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
